product: New Databricks JDBC Driver is open source
tagline: The new Databricks JDBC Driver is now open source.
what_it_does: The new Databricks JDBC Driver is now open source. The source code is publicly available under the Apache 2.0 license. Community contributions are welcome.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
key_takeaway: The new Databricks JDBC Driver is now open source.
